betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6RBMK Thorium Fuel (ThMEU)§f

§aThe safest RBMK fuel — Euler function physically caps flux output, making it a perfect stabilizer!§f

§bThMEU-233§f is RBMK thorium fuel composed of U-233 (fissile) and Th-232 (fertile). Its Euler flux function makes it one of the safest fuels in the game.

§6RBMK Fuel Stats§f:
§b• Yield:§f 100,000,000
§b• Self-igniting:§f No
§b• Splits with:§f Slow neutrons → Fast neutrons
§b• Flux Function:§f (1 − e^(−x/25)) · 20 — Euler type
§b• Danger Level:§f Safe — absolute max output of 20 flux
§b• Depletion:§f Boosted slope (gets stronger as it depletes!)
§b• Xenon Gen:§f x · 0.5 | Xenon Burn: x² · 50
§b• Heat at 100 flux:§f 0.65°C (negligible)
§b• Diffusion:§f 0.02 1/2
§b• Melting Point:§f 3,350°C
§b• Start Radiation:§f 7.0 RAD/s

§6Breeding Nature§f: The boosted slope depletion function means thorium fuel becomes §estronger§f as it depletes, reflecting the breeding of U-233 from Th-232 during operation.

§6Stabilizer Fuel§f: Because the Euler function plateaus at just 20 flux, ThMEU is §eideal for stabilizing§f dangerous linear and negative-quadratic function fuels. It absorbs their excess flux output without causing runaway reactions.

§6Crafting§f (shapeless): Empty RBMK Fuel Rod + 8 Thorium Fuel Billets

§6Recycling§f (SILEX, infrared laser):
• Xenon poison reduces yield by §e1%§f
§b• Brand New:§f 84% ThMEU, 6% U-233, 10% long-lived waste
§b• Fully Depleted:§f 4% ThMEU, 22% U-233, 74% long-lived waste
• The §e22% U-233§f from fully depleted fuel makes this cycle self-sustaining!

§eStrategy§f: Use ThMEU as a buffer fuel alongside high-output fuels in your RBMK. It prevents meltdowns while contributing stable, predictable power.
